tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def triggered-high (filter (fn [i] (and (= (:urgency i) "high") (= (:status i) "triggered"))) (pagerduty_incidents)))

(def count (count triggered-high))

(def ids (map :id triggered-high))

{:count count :ids ids}"}
